This training is intended for anyone with an Alpha Ranger, Dirt Ranger, or Khaki Ranger volunteer shift at ToTheMoon -- or anyone who just wants to learn more about these awesome volunteers. 

ToTheMoon Rangers team is looking for quite a few volunteers to join their team! Rangers aren’t security or bouncers or police…but they are sober adults in cargo pants and matching shirts that walk the burn and assist in mediation or connecting you with the type of help you may need… These volunteers are extremely important and help keep the burn a safe space for everyone. 

NOTE: Please bring your own water bottle, chair/blanket, sun protection, snack, and/or stuffie to the training to exemplify your Radical Self-Reliance.

Fire performers must attend one of the fire safety meetingsand obtain a piece of Conclave swag. This swag will enable you to spin fire throughout the burn in the various camps and participate in the Conclave Saturday night. 

Fire performers must only fire perform in designated performance areas separated from the crowd under the supervision of an aware, trained safety with blanket in hand or on the ground in front of them. Before each burn, check that your physical state (props, fuel, skills, wind speed, and clothing) and mental state (sober!) are appropriate. All Conclave participants (fire performers and fire safety volunteers, new and experienced) must attend one of the fire safety meetings listed below at the effigy field, and please bring fuel donations. There will be live fire demonstrations, so please wear fire-safe clothing.

For all these meetings and events, bring your safeties! New or veteran, we would be overjoyed for you to spin fire with us!

Let’s open this space with intention and call ourselves home. 

After the flurry of arrival and the energy of setting up camp, join us to drop out of the doing and into the being. 

Through gentle, grounding breath work and shared presence, we will root ourselves into the earth, connect with ourselves, and set a collective intention for the beautiful weekend ahead. 

Welcome home.

Dust off your whiskers and brush off your fancy ears and slip on your finest feline flair for a night of purrfectly unhinged decadence. We’re serving custom cat-themed margaritas, glowing vibes, and enough cat ears to summon nine lives’ worth of chaos.

Come dressed as a sassy housecat, ferocious tiger, mysterious sphinx, disco panther, or whatever strange creature inspires.

Expect roaming cats, fuzzy fashion, and late-night mischief under the stars.

No humans allowed. Only cats in disguise.

A meet and greet for the Sanctuary volunteers. Get to know the leads and meet your fellow support staff. Have questions? This is a great time to get answers and see the space. Thank you for volunteering with Sanctuary!

column2: The Evolving Edge: Kink, Connection, and the Long-Term Partnership
column8:
Midday Lightly Guided Conversation

When you’ve been together for years, and playing together for just as long, the conversation changes. It’s no longer about discovery in the beginner sense; it’s about evolution.

How do our kinks shift as our bodies change? How do we stay open to new energy when we share domestic life? How do we mediate shared history? 

Join us for a relaxed, lightly facilitated midday honest conversation with other long-term partners.

We hope to go beyond the basics and discuss the nuances of a seasoned kink life:
•The Integration Phase: Moving past scene night and looking at how power, play, and intimacy weave into the fabric of a long-term life.
•The Changing Body: Navigating physical shifts, energy levels, and new boundaries with grace and creativity.
•Deepening the Script: Breaking out of autopilot play and finding new edges within a familiar partnership.
•Emotional Sustainability: Managing the Aftercare of a decade-long relationship.

This is a peer-level space for couples who are already active and looking for a thoughtful,  environment to talk shop. We provide the prompts and the structure; you provide the lived experience.

Expect a friendly, high-trust atmosphere where the goal isn't to fix anything, but to honor where you’ve been and explore where you’re going next.

💖Happy ReBirthDay🌱

In support of Participation, Communal Effort, and Gifting, Garden Party is delighted to host a ReBirthDay Party for YOU! 

We are providing a ReBirthDay cake, sweet treats, salty and savory snacks and presents! 

We hope YOU are bringing:
🎨 Face painting
🤹 Jugglers & flow artists
🎶 Musicians & wandering instrumentalists
📖 Poetry readers & storytellers
🎤 Singers & sing-a-long leaders
🛠 Teachers of curious skills & hobbies
😂 Stand-up comics & delightfully bad comedians
🔮 Tarot readers, oracle readers & mystical beings

This is not about perfection.
This is about participation, play, connection, expression, and creating moments together.

Whether you are wildly talented, charmingly awkward, deeply soulful, or charismatically chaotic — there is a place for you at the party.

Bring a gift.
Bring a skill.
Bring a ridiculous idea.
Bring your strange little spark.
Bring your magical presence.

Don't forget to pick up your ReBirth Certificate before you leave!

Temple of the Burning Heart

Rising from the ash on Temple Hill stands—a sanctuary of impermanence, a monument to the stories we leave behind. Its wooden beams whisper with the weight of memory, each carved detail a prayer, each offering a farewell.

Here, sorrow and joy entwine like smoke in the Tennessee wind. Here, burdens are set down, love is spoken, and silence is sacred. Within its radiant glow , past and present embrace—laughter echoes, grief lingers, and forgiveness takes root in the spaces between.

At its heart, fire awaits—not in destruction, but in transformation. Flames will consume, not to erase, but to release. As the temple turns to embers, so do the words, the wounds, the wishes woven into it. Nothing is lost. Everything is carried forward.

This is a place for letting go. This is a place for remembering. This is a place for beginning again.
